condition.comment: Create positive condition based on framework name
condition.name: testlumCondition

condition.comment: Create negative condition based on framework name
condition.name: randomCondition

assert.comment: Check that assert will be executed if framework eq 'Testlum'

equal.comment: Check that framework value is equal to Testlum

notEqual.comment: Check that framework value is not equal to Random

assert.comment: Check that assert will be executed if framework eq 'Random'

equal.comment: Check that framework value is equal to Random

notEqual.comment: Check that framework value is not equal to Testlum

assert.comment: Check conditions work inside assert command

equal.comment: Check that framework value is equal to Testlum

notEqual.comment: Check that framework value is not equal to Random

equal.comment: Check that framework value is equal to Random

notEqual.comment: Check that framework value is not equal to Testlum

condition.comment: Create combined condition which always false
condition.name: combinedNegativeCondition

condition.comment: Create combined condition which always true
condition.name: combinedPositiveCondition

assert.comment: Check conditions work inside assert command

equal.comment: Check that combinedPositiveCondition is equal to true
Check that combinedNegativeCondition is equal to false
Check that equality command will never be executed based on combinedNegativeCondition

var.comment: Create variable with quotes to check correct processing in condition
var.name: variable_with_quotes

condition.comment: Create positive condition to verify length and pattern matching for variable_with_quotes
condition.name: positive_quoted_condition

condition.comment: Create negative condition to verify length and pattern matching for variable_with_quotes
condition.name: negative_quoted_condition

assert.comment: Verify values of positive_quoted_condition and negative_quoted_condition

equal.comment: Verify that value of positive_quoted_condition is true
Verify that value of negative_quoted_condition is false because of incorrect length check
